title: CCL - Selecting UC Noise Block
scenario: UC Noise Block option can be selected in Device Settings > Advanced on the Poly Studio Mobile app when connected to a supported device
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Ensure a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Scroll down and tap on "Advanced" in the Device Settings menu.
Locate the "UC Noise Block" option in the Advanced settings.
Tap on the "UC Noise Block" option to select it.
expected: The "UC Noise Block" option is selectable (tappable) and becomes enabled/active in the Advanced settings.
